title: Hatsune Miku's Leek 2.0
description: I made the Leek wich belongs to the vocaloid Hatsune Miku  for the second time
body:
# 🥬 Miku Leek Sword 2.0
Tired of boring old Netherite swords? Rename it Leek and BOOM — now you're wielding Hatsune Miku’s ultimate weapon: the mighty green onion. Yes, really.

## The Leek:
![LEEK!!!!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eb3a806490b49f988bc249901af72c7a124242d.jpeg)
## 🎤 **FEATURES:**
Slap a new name on your Netherite Sword **`Leek`** and watch it transform into the legendary Vocaloid Vegetable of Doom

Looks so good it might make Endermen start dancing

### 🧪 **Requires:**
noting since minecraft added the possibility to change the texture when renamed in vanilla
